items.title: The next Call of Duty is not coming to PS4 (or presumably Xbox One)
items.summary: Activision Blizzard seems to be focusing on next-gen platforms.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Threads finally brings messaging to the web
items.summary: By bringing messaging to the web, Threads is aligning its desktop experience more closely with competitors like X and Bluesky.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Threads is finally getting DMs on the web
items.summary: Nearly a year after rolling out Threads direct messaging to everyone on mobile, Meta is finally bringing the feature to the web. Meta says it's "testing" DMs on the web now, but...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
